text_jp: 特に役立つものは無い{END}

text_en: There is some kind of model...{END}

text_jp: 基地か何かのように見えるが…{END}
text_en: It looks like a base or something...{END}

text_jp:
手前にムラサキと金の
スロットがある{END}
text_en:
There are purple and gold slots
in front of it.{END}

text_jp:
何かの設計図のようだが…
{END}
text_en:
It seems to be
some kind of blueprint...{END}

text_jp:
文字は象形文字のようで
読むことができない{END}
text_en:
The writing looks like pictographs,
and cannot be read.{END}

text_jp: 特に気になるものは無い{END}

コンピューターが並んでいる
特に気になるところは無い{END}
text_en:
Computers are lined up.
Nothing in particular catches your eye.{END}

text_jp: この部屋のコントロール装置のようだ{END}
text_en: It seems to control this room.{END}

text_jp: 地獄大使の計画は阻止した……{END}
text_en: Ambassador Hell's plan has been stopped...{END}

text_jp: あとは邪眼の復活を止めなければ！{END}
text_en: Now we must stop Jagan's revival!{END}
